reviews.comment:
Buena ubicación, perfecta para la salida justo de santa clara, en la costa

Good location, perfect for leaving Santa Clara, on the coast

reviews.comment:
Muy chiquita para el movimiento que tiene en temporada. Se relentiza mucho.Un peligro para los que quedan esperando ser atendidos,ya que quedan sobre la banquina de la ruta.

(Translated by Google)
It's too small for the amount of traffic it handles during peak season. It slows down considerably. It's dangerous for those waiting to be served, as they end up on the shoulder of the road.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXN0pHQUh3EAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención del personal. El problema es q siempre está explotada de autos. No da abasto para la temporada de verano. Tenes q buscar los horarios donde puede haber menos gente.

(Translated by Google)
The staff is attentive. The problem is that it's always packed with cars. It can't handle the summer season. You have to look for times when it's less crowded.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXbUs3ZXZBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Increíble que una Estación ACA no tenga un microondas para calentar una mamadera.  La atención del personal es pésima

(Translated by Google)
It's unbelievable that an ACA station doesn't have a microwave to heat a baby bottle. The staff's service is terrible.
